Title: Verify Data Organizer Interaction with Firebase
Preconditions: Data organizer is initialized and connected to Firebase.
Test Steps:
1. Initiate interaction from Data Organizer to Firebase.
2. Ensure Firebase interacts with Realtime Database, Authentication, and Firebase Database.
Expected Result: Successful interaction and data synchronization between Data Organizer and Firebase components.

Title: Local User Interacts with Data Display
Preconditions: Local user is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Local user initiates interaction with Data Display.
2. Data Display retrieves data from Data Organizer.
Expected Result: Data Display successfully shows relevant data to the local user.

Title: Create and Send a Chat Message
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Data:
- Chat ID: 1
- URL1: "http://example.com/chat1"
- URL2: "http://example.com/chat2"
- Message ID: 1
- Receiver ID: 2
- Timestamp: "2023-10-01T12:00:00Z"
- Text: "Hello, how are you?"
Test Steps:
1. User creates a chat with provided URLs.
2. User sends a message to another user within the chat.
Expected Result: Message is successfully sent and received by the intended user.

Title: Establish Relationship Between Chat and User
Preconditions: Chat and User are created and authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. Associate Chat with User through Relation.
2. Verify association is correctly stored.
Expected Result: Chat and User are properly associated via Relation.

Title: Retrieve Messages from a Chat
Preconditions: Chat and User are created and authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. User requests messages from a specific chat.
2. System retrieves and displays messages.
Expected Result: All messages from the specified chat are displayed to the user.

Title: User Profile Creation and Authentication
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Nickname: "john_doe"
- Password: "password123"
- Position: Latitude 40.7128, Longitude -74.0060
- Tokens: 100
- Rate: 5.0
Test Steps:
1. User registers with provided details.
2. User logs in using registered credentials.
Expected Result: User profile is created and authenticated successfully.

Title: Create and Publish a Post
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Data:
- Post ID: 1
- Nickname: "john_doe"
- Fridge ID: 1
- Type: 1
- Cost: 10
Test Steps:
1. User creates a post with specified details.
2. Post is published and associated with the user's fridge.
Expected Result: Post is successfully created and published, associated with the user's fridge.

Title: Manage Fridge Inventory
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Data:
- Fridge ID: 1
- Name: "My Fridge"
- Quantity: 10
- Best Before Date: "2023-12-31"
- Owner Nickname: "john_doe"
Test Steps:
1. User adds a new fridge with provided details.
2. User updates fridge inventory.
Expected Result: Fridge is added and inventory is updated successfully.

Title: Remove Product from Fridge
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates removal of a product from their fridge.
2. Schema Principale sends ChangeFragment() to fragment Frigorifero.
3. fragment Frigorifero sends RimuoviProdotto() to Firebase Database.
Expected Result: Product is successfully removed from the fridge and the change is synchronized with Firebase Database.

Title: Handle Edge Cases in Data Organizer
Preconditions: Data organizer is initialized but Firebase is unavailable.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to synchronize data with Firebase.
2. Check for error handling and fallback mechanisms.
Expected Result:
System handles the failure gracefully and retries synchronization upon availability of Firebase. <|

Title: Unauthorized Access to Data Display
Preconditions: Local user is not authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to access Data Display without authentication.
2. Verify that unauthorized access is blocked.
Expected Result: Unauthorized access is denied, and an appropriate error message is displayed.

Title: Invalid Chat URL Handling
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to create a chat with invalid URLs.
2. Verify that the system rejects the invalid URLs.
Expected Result: System rejects the invalid URLs and returns an error message.

Title: Duplicate Relationship Establishment
Preconditions: Chat and User are created and authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to establish a duplicate relationship between the same Chat and User.
2. Verify that the system prevents duplicate entries.
Expected Result: System prevents the establishment of a duplicate relationship and returns an error message.
